subject: feat(import): create new income/expense line from import review
body:
During import review, users can now create a new recurring income or
expense line directly from the reassign dropdown without leaving the
wizard. The modal form pre-fills description, category, amount, and
type from the imported CSV row. The new expense is saved to DB and
auto-assigned to the row with manual confidence.

Tags: import, ux, cashflow
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: cashflow-pivot
Semver: minor
